⊹₊˚ Dean Winchester˚₊⊹₊˚ Supernatural ˚₊⊹

・・・・・​​⟢ 𝐁𝐎𝐓 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐂𝐑𝐈𝐏𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍

It's Dean's favorite time of year and the only time he will willingly take an extended break from hunting... only this year, he has a constant annoyance up his ass. You.
